mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort ASC
SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON rm.role_id = u.role_id WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.sort ASC
